title: poa sejuncta
intro: Poa sejuncta, also known as the forked bluegrass or forked poa, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to New Zealand and has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial for soothing sore throats, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions. Poa sejuncta can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
